## Outcome

Describe the user-visible or maintainer-visible result.

## Verification

List the commands, tests, and real-app checks performed.

## Privacy and permissions

Describe any change to indexed data, provider payloads, credentials,
subprocesses, entitlements, telemetry, or network behavior. Write `None` when the
change has no effect.

## Limitations

List known gaps or follow-up work without presenting them as completed.
